Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, I think I forgot my eraser back in my room... Junpei, I'm borrowing yours for a sec.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Whoa, hold on! Only the flat side, okay? It's brand new. You've gotta keep the corners sharp...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Huh? What's the big deal? It's just an eraser.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}An eraser's corners are a special privilege reserved for the owner! A precious and fleeting source of euphoria![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 10 25 25}Didn't you learn that when you were a kid? One man's eraser is another man's treasure![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}C'mon, Fuuka, do you get what I'm sayin' here? You're laughing, but this is a serious matter![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Hehe... Oh, sorry. It just crossed my mind how peaceful things are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It's strange that just being able to study with everyone like this can make me feel so... happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It makes me wonder if this might be the last time we ever get to do this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Uh, just kidding! Sorry, forget I said that! I was just... thinking about next year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Yeah... I guess that's the way to think about it. If I go in expecting the worst, I'm just going to shut down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Thanks. That makes me feel a little better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Haha, maybe you have a point... It's not like obsessing over it's going to change anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Well, that took a little weight off my shoulders. Time to concentrate on getting ready for those exams![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}That's... not really what I meant.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Haha, you're a real goof sometimes, {f 4 1}-kun... I never know what to expect out of you in a time like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But... thanks. I think I needed that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Alright! Time to get back to studying! Oh, Fuuka, can I have some lead for my pencil?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Oh, sure. You can take some from this one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Thankies! Oh, {f 4 2}, lemme borrow your highlighter for a sec.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We all concentrated on studying...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Hey Yuka-tan... Mind if I borrow your ruler?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I guess, but... why have you been borrowing all of our stuff? Don't you have your own?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Listen... When I heard you forgot your eraser, something just hit me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}The simple act of helpin' each other out is like... That's what it's all about, y'know? That's... happiness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}You say that, but you probably just forgot to bring all your stuff, didn't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Thank you for studying with me, everyone. I hope we can do this again.[n]{f 1 1}
